inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard international mile to meter conversion factor

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places in output

inputs.label: Rounding Mode (0=round, 1=floor, 2=ceil)
inputs.businessContext: Rounding method: 0 rounds to nearest, 1 always rounds down, 2 always rounds up

formulas.rounded_meters: rounding_mode === 0 ? Math.round(raw_meters * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : rounding_mode === 1 ? Math.floor(raw_meters * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision) : Math.ceil(raw_meters * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
